headline: Here Are Thursday’s Best Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Align Technology, American Tower, Caesars Entertainment, Cohu, Five Below, Intuitive Surgical, Salesforce, Toast, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading mixed after another tough day across Wall Street, with all the major indices crushed early on, before the Nasdaq made a late-afternoon push to wind up just modestly higher at 25,870, up 0.20%. The S&P 500 also rallied in the afternoon, erasing a big deficit, to finish the session ... headline: What to Expect From Align Technology’s Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Align Technology is all set to report its second-quarter earnings results later this month, and analysts project its EPS to rise from last year’s quarter.

headline: Align Technology (ALGN) Stock Looks Undervalued With Earnings Priced About Right
summary: Align Technology stock is caught between a weak long term share price record and valuation indicators that suggest the current market price may still sit below its intrinsic value. Despite the share price being down sharply over five years, the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate currently points to meaningful upside relative to where the stock trades. Align Technology shares have declined 72.5% over the past five years, which means long term holders have taken substantial...
